pattern.styleContract: Fresh and inclusive with guest-service proof, real mocktail cart evidence, citrus action accents, and garnish menu cards as the signature move.

tagline: A beverage cart with zero boring sips.

hero.title: SpritzLoop mocktail beverage cart hero image
hero.alt: A beverage attendant garnishing colorful mocktails at a compact cart with citrus, herbs, and glassware.

contact.serviceArea: Mocktail carts, zero-proof bars, citrus spritz service, shower beverages, corporate refreshment carts, graduation parties, weddings, birthdays, and private events in River Market, North Loop, Oak Hill, Westbrook, and Maple Bend

copy.heroText: SpritzLoop brings zero-proof drinks, citrus, herbs, glassware, and a tidy cart setup for events that want the fun without alcohol.
copy.introTitle: The garnish is cute. The service plan matters.
copy.introText: We match drink styles, guest count, glassware needs, service timing, power or water access, and whether the cart is hosted or self-serve.
copy.proofTitle: Fresh proof before the first pour
copy.quoteText: Compare packages with date, location, guest count, drink vibe, and service window. We will suggest the right cart package and garnish plan.

services.title: Spritz Cart
services.text: A hosted cart with citrus-forward mocktails, garnish prep, glassware notes, and a cheerful service rhythm.

services.title: Batch And Pour
services.text: Prepped zero-proof drinks served cleanly for showers, offices, and open-house style events.

services.title: Signature Sip Menu
services.text: Two or three custom flavors, garnish styling, and a menu flow built around the guest count.

process.title: Pick the drink vibe
process.text: Fresh, herbal, bright, cozy, or celebratory notes help us shape the menu.

process.title: Plan the cart
process.text: Guest count, service time, power, ice, glassware, and location access get confirmed.

process.title: Serve and reset
process.text: We garnish, pour, replenish, tidy the cart, and hand off leftovers or batch notes.

proof.label: setup needs confirmed before event day

notes: Works: garnish menu cards. gives the page a memorable shape.
Proof: beverage attendant garnishing mocktails at a citrus cart with glassware and herbs. anchors the niche in the first viewport.
Action: Plan mocktails is the main conversion path.

brandBrief.accentBehavior: sun stays reserved for Plan mocktails, active proof cues, and key booking moments.
brandBrief.imageProof: beverage attendant garnishing mocktails at a citrus cart with glassware and herbs.
brandBrief.avoidLookingLike: Avoid a generic package-menu-board recolor; do not repeat stock hero framing, copied card rhythm, or vague local-service claims.

serviceDetails.whatToSend: Share the event date, venue or address, guest count, setup window, power/water rules, and the package style you are considering.
serviceDetails.prepNote: Fresh, herbal, bright, cozy, or celebratory notes help us shape the menu.
serviceDetails.serviceRhythm: Date-window flow for Mocktail carts, zero-proof bars, citrus spritz service, shower beverages, corporate refreshment carts, graduation parties, weddings, birthdays, and private events in River Market, North Loop, Oak Hill, Westbrook, and Maple Bend: date fit, setup rules, guest flow, and hold status come before package pressure.
serviceDetails.objectionAnswer: For mocktail and beverage cart service, guest count, menu pace, service footprint, prep access, and cleanup timing are matched before the package is recommended.
